findings.message: D2 says trait method edges are added for `EdgeSet::Methods | EdgeSet::All`, but the rendering note relies on trait nodes already appearing via `EdgeSet::Impls`. That leaves method-only/default outputs without an explicit way to render trait sources, and the clustered pipeline classifies clusters from type nodes only, so trait-source edges are not guaranteed to appear. The plan needs to specify trait-node assignment/rendering independent of impl edges for D2 to be executable.

D3 requires `render_type_graph_overview` to collect parameter-edge indices and apply `linkStyle`, but the overview collapses multiple cross-cluster edges into one `(source_cluster, target_cluster)` count. A single overview edge can represent a mix of return-derived and parameter-derived edges, so there is no unambiguous parameter edge index to style unless the plan splits overview groups by origin/kind or excludes overview from this styling rule.
